title: 加乘原理·路线选择
question: 如图，从A地到B地有3条路可走，从B地到C地有4条路可走，从A地直接到C地有2条路可走。那么从A地到C地一共有多少种不同的走法？

figures.svg:
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 500 200' width='500' height='200'>
  <defs>
    <marker id='arrow' markerWidth='8' markerHeight='6' refX='8' refY='3' orient='auto'>
      <path d='M0,0 L8,3 L0,6 Z' fill='#555'/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  
  <!-- 地点 A, B, C -->
  <circle cx='60' cy='100' r='20' fill='#e74c3c' opacity='0.8'/>
  <text x='60' y='106' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='16' fill='#fff' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>A</text>
  
  <circle cx='250' cy='100' r='20' fill='#3498db' opacity='0.8'/>
  <text x='250' y='106' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='16' fill='#fff' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>B</text>
  
  <circle cx='440' cy='100' r='20' fill='#2ecc71' opacity='0.8'/>
  <text x='440' y='106' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='16' fill='#fff' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>C</text>
  
  <!-- A 到 B 的 3 条路 -->
  <path d='M80,85 Q165,70 230,85' fill='none' stroke='#e74c3c' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/>
  <path d='M80,100 L230,100' fill='none' stroke='#e74c3c' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/>
  <path d='M80,115 Q165,130 230,115' fill='none' stroke='#e74c3c' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/>
  
  <!-- B 到 C 的 4 条路 -->
  <path d='M270,85 Q355,70 420,85' fill='none' stroke='#3498db' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/>
  <path d='M270,93 Q355,90 420,93' fill='none' stroke='#3498db' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/>
  <path d='M270,107 Q355,110 420,107' fill='none' stroke='#3498db' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/>
  <path d='M270,115 Q355,130 420,115' fill='none' stroke='#3498db' stroke-width='2' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/>
  
  <!-- A 直接到 C 的 2 条路 -->
  <path d='M80,160 Q250,180 420,160' fill='none' stroke='#2ecc71' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='8,4' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/>
  <path d='M80,175 Q250,195 420,175' fill='none' stroke='#2ecc71' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='8,4' marker-end='url(#arrow)'/>
  
  <!-- 标注 -->
  <text x='155' y='75' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='12' fill='#e74c3c' text-anchor='middle'>3条</text>
  <text x='345' y='75' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='12' fill='#3498db' text-anchor='middle'>4条</text>
  <text x='250' y='165' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='12' fill='#2ecc71' text-anchor='middle'>2条(直达)</text>
</svg>
figures.caption: A到B有3条路，B到C有4条路，A直达C有2条路
figures.alt: 路线图：A、B、C三地之间的道路连接情况

solutions.label: 加乘原理分析法
steps: 从A到C有两类方式：经过B，或者不经过B（直达）。
第一类：经过B。从A到B有3种选择，从B到C有4种选择。根据乘法原理，共有 3 × 4 = 12 种走法。
第二类：不经过B，直接从A到C。有2种走法。
根据加法原理，总走法 = 第一类 + 第二类 = 12 + 2 = 14 种。

scenes.svg:
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 500 200' width='500' height='200'>
  <defs>
    <marker id='arrow1' markerWidth='8' markerHeight='6' refX='8' refY='3' orient='auto'>
      <path d='M0,0 L8,3 L0,6 Z' fill='#e74c3c'/>
    </marker>
    <marker id='arrow2' markerWidth='8' markerHeight='6' refX='8' refY='3' orient='auto'>
      <path d='M0,0 L8,3 L0,6 Z' fill='#3498db'/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  
  <circle cx='60' cy='100' r='20' fill='#e74c3c' opacity='0.8'/>
  <text x='60' y='106' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='16' fill='#fff' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>A</text>
  
  <circle cx='250' cy='100' r='20' fill='#3498db' opacity='0.8'/>
  <text x='250' y='106' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='16' fill='#fff' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>B</text>
  
  <circle cx='440' cy='100' r='20' fill='#ccc' opacity='0.5'/>
  <text x='440' y='106' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='16' fill='#999' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>C</text>
  
  <!-- 高亮 A→B→C 路线 -->
  <path d='M80,85 Q165,70 230,85' fill='none' stroke='#e74c3c' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrow1)'/>
  <path d='M80,100 L230,100' fill='none' stroke='#e74c3c' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrow1)'/>
  <path d='M80,115 Q165,130 230,115' fill='none' stroke='#e74c3c' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrow1)'/>
  
  <path d='M270,85 Q355,70 420,85' fill='none' stroke='#3498db' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrow2)'/>
  <path d='M270,93 Q355,90 420,93' fill='none' stroke='#3498db' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrow2)'/>
  <path d='M270,107 Q355,110 420,107' fill='none' stroke='#3498db' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrow2)'/>
  <path d='M270,115 Q355,130 420,115' fill='none' stroke='#3498db' stroke-width='3' marker-end='url(#arrow2)'/>
  
  <text x='155' y='65' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='#e74c3c' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>3 种</text>
  <text x='345' y='65' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='#3498db' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>4 种</text>
  
  <text x='250' y='50' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='13' fill='#333' text-anchor='middle'>第一类：经过B</text>
  <text x='250' y='165' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='13' fill='#e74c3c' text-anchor='middle'>3 × 4 = 12 种</text>
</svg>
scenes.caption: 第一类：经过B。A→B有3种，B→C有4种，乘法原理：3×4=12种

scenes.svg:
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 500 200' width='500' height='200'>
  <defs>
    <marker id='arrow3' markerWidth='8' markerHeight='6' refX='8' refY='3' orient='auto'>
      <path d='M0,0 L8,3 L0,6 Z' fill='#2ecc71'/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  
  <circle cx='60' cy='100' r='20' fill='#2ecc71' opacity='0.8'/>
  <text x='60' y='106' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='16' fill='#fff' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>A</text>
  
  <circle cx='250' cy='100' r='20' fill='#ccc' opacity='0.3'/>
  <text x='250' y='106' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='16' fill='#999' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>B</text>
  
  <circle cx='440' cy='100' r='20' fill='#2ecc71' opacity='0.8'/>
  <text x='440' y='106' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='16' fill='#fff' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>C</text>
  
  <!-- 高亮直达路线 -->
  <path d='M80,160 Q250,180 420,160' fill='none' stroke='#2ecc71' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='8,4' marker-end='url(#arrow3)'/>
  <path d='M80,175 Q250,195 420,175' fill='none' stroke='#2ecc71' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='8,4' marker-end='url(#arrow3)'/>
  
  <text x='250' y='150' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='#2ecc71' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>2 种</text>
  
  <text x='250' y='50' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='13' fill='#333' text-anchor='middle'>第二类：直达（不经过B）</text>
  <text x='250' y='135' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='13' fill='#2ecc71' text-anchor='middle'>共 2 种</text>
</svg>
scenes.caption: 第二类：直达。A直接到C有2种走法
加法原理：12 + 2 = 14 种不同的走法

variant.question: 从甲地到乙地有2条路，乙地到丙地有5条路，甲地直接到丙地有3条路。从甲地到丙地有多少种走法？
variant.hint: 经过乙地：2×5=10种；直达：3种。合计13种。
